TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Finacadan no katimolay a kanatal == Finacadan no katimolay a kanatalan i,odengan a maroay i kanatalaan a finacadan i hkal,O komod no caciyaw nangra i ,anca' tahira i 1,300 ko pinangan.O kamaroan nara i tadakatimol i ,tangasa i ka^tip no Nanmico a kafowakan a kanatal；O ka^tip i ,tangasa i kawaliay no liyar no Afikan a Ma- takaska a kanatal；O katimol i, tangasa i Niwsilan；O kaamis i tangasa i Taywan ato Liwkiw a kanatal no Dipong . I ayaw no mikingkiway to i kaayaway no Tawan a finacada sanay a sowal i, o pasaniay i kawali ato katimolay a mafolaw san,nikawrira, ono aniniay a pikinkiw a sowal i ,o satapangan(kalitngan, kalingatowaan) no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal ko Taywan sanay. 語系 O caciyaw no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal i, tosaay ko tadapi- nangan,sakaccay i, o"Taywanay a caciyaw"；sakatosa i ,o"Ma- layo-Polynesian a caciyaw".O sowal no itiniay i Taywan a finacadan a caci- yaw i,caay ka^ca a talolongca ko kalawilawit nangra,malaliniliniay ho to caciyaw no i "Taypin a liyar", "Into a liyar"a finacadan,mato misowalan no mikingkiway to"caciyaw no katimolay a kanatal " san.Ano pakani to sa'osi ato pinanga a caciyaw no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal i ,ira ko mal- ecaday nangra, malo sa'osi no "tosa", "lima",ato"mata", "loma^", "makaen"(komaen) hanaay a caciyaw,o ngaay a sasongilaen konini a mikingkiw.
S.PHON: == finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ == finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾan i,o~uɬ~ɮəŋan a maro~uaj i kanataɾaan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i ħkaɾ,o~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦaʦijaw naŋra i ,anʦaʡ taħira i *,*** ko~u pinaŋan.o~u kamaro~uan nara i taɬ~ɮakatimo~uɾ i ,taŋasa i kaʔtip no~u nanmiʦo~u a kafo~uwakan a kanataɾ*o~u kaʔtip i ,taŋasa i kawaɾiaj no~u ɾijar no~u afikan a ma- takaska a kanataɾ*o~u katimo~uɾ i, taŋasa i niwsiɾan*o~u kaamis i taŋasa i tajwan ato~u ɾiwkiw a kanataɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ . i ajaw no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u i kaajawaj no~u tawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮa sanaj a so~uwaɾ i, o~u pasaniaj i kawaɾi ato~u katimo~uɾaj a mafo~uɾaw san,nikawrira, o~uno~u aniniaj a pikinkiw a so~uwaɾ i ,o~u satapaŋan(kaɾitŋan, kaɾiŋato~uwaan) no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ ko~u tajwan sanaj. ** o~u ʦaʦijaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ i, to~usaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮapi- naŋan,sakaʦʦaj i, o~u"tajwanaj a ʦaʦijaw"*sakato~usa i ,o~u"ma- ɾajo~u-po~uɾjnəsian a ʦaʦijaw".o~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj i tajwan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ʦaʦi- jaw i,ʦaaj kaʔʦa a taɾo~uɾo~uŋʦa ko~u kaɾawiɾawit naŋra,maɾaɾiniɾiniaj ħo~u to~u ʦaʦijaw no~u i "tajpin a ɾijar", "into~u a ɾijar"a finaʦaɬ~ɮan,mato~u miso~uwaɾan no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u"ʦaʦijaw no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ " san.ano~u pakani to~u saʡo~usi ato~u pinaŋa a ʦaʦijaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ i ,ira ko~u maɾ- əʦaɬ~ɮaj naŋra, maɾo~u saʡo~usi no~u "to~usa", "ɾima",ato~u"mata", "ɾo~umaʔ", "makaən"(ko~umaən) ħanaaj a ʦaʦijaw,o~u ŋaaj a saso~uŋiɾaən ko~unini a mikiŋkiw.
S.FORM: == Finacadan no katimolay a kanatal == Finacadan no katimolay a kanatalan i,odengan a maroay i kanatalaan a finacadan i hkal,O komod no caciyaw nangra i ,anca' tahira i 1,300 ko pinangan.O kamaroan nara i tadakatimol i ,tangasa i ka^tip no Nanmico a kafowakan a kanatal；O ka^tip i ,tangasa i kawaliay no liyar no Afikan a Ma- takaska a kanatal；O katimol i, tangasa i Niwsilan；O kaamis i tangasa i Taywan ato Liwkiw a kanatal no Dipong . I ayaw no mikingkiway to i kaayaway no Tawan a finacada sanay a sowal i, o pasaniay i kawali ato katimolay a mafolaw san,nikawrira, ono aniniay a pikinkiw a sowal i ,o satapangan(kalitngan, kalingatowaan) no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal ko Taywan sanay. 語系 O caciyaw no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal i, tosaay ko tadapi- nangan,sakaccay i, o"Taywanay a caciyaw"；sakatosa i ,o"Ma- layo-Polynesian a caciyaw".O sowal no itiniay i Taywan a finacadan a caci- yaw i,caay ka^ca a talolongca ko kalawilawit nangra,malaliniliniay ho to caciyaw no i "Taypin a liyar", "Into a liyar"a finacadan,mato misowalan no mikingkiway to"caciyaw no katimolay a kanatal " san.Ano pakani to sa'osi ato pinanga a caciyaw no finacadan no katimolay a kanatal i ,ira ko mal- ecaday nangra, malo sa'osi no "tosa", "lima",ato"mata", "loma^", "makaen"(komaen) hanaay a caciyaw,o ngaay a sasongilaen konini a mikingkiw.
S.PHON: == finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ == finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾan i,o~uɬ~ɮəŋan a maro~uaj i kanataɾaan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i ħkaɾ,o~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦaʦijaw naŋra i ,anʦaʡ taħira i *,*** ko~u pinaŋan.o~u kamaro~uan nara i taɬ~ɮakatimo~uɾ i ,taŋasa i kaʔtip no~u nanmiʦo~u a kafo~uwakan a kanataɾ*o~u kaʔtip i ,taŋasa i kawaɾiaj no~u ɾijar no~u afikan a ma- takaska a kanataɾ*o~u katimo~uɾ i, taŋasa i niwsiɾan*o~u kaamis i taŋasa i tajwan ato~u ɾiwkiw a kanataɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ . i ajaw no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u i kaajawaj no~u tawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮa sanaj a so~uwaɾ i, o~u pasaniaj i kawaɾi ato~u katimo~uɾaj a mafo~uɾaw san,nikawrira, o~uno~u aniniaj a pikinkiw a so~uwaɾ i ,o~u satapaŋan(kaɾitŋan, kaɾiŋato~uwaan) no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ ko~u tajwan sanaj. ** o~u ʦaʦijaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ i, to~usaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮapi- naŋan,sakaʦʦaj i, o~u"tajwanaj a ʦaʦijaw"*sakato~usa i ,o~u"ma- ɾajo~u-po~uɾjnəsian a ʦaʦijaw".o~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj i tajwan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ʦaʦi- jaw i,ʦaaj kaʔʦa a taɾo~uɾo~uŋʦa ko~u kaɾawiɾawit naŋra,maɾaɾiniɾiniaj ħo~u to~u ʦaʦijaw no~u i "tajpin a ɾijar", "into~u a ɾijar"a finaʦaɬ~ɮan,mato~u miso~uwaɾan no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u"ʦaʦijaw no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ " san.ano~u pakani to~u saʡo~usi ato~u pinaŋa a ʦaʦijaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u katimo~uɾaj a kanataɾ i ,ira ko~u maɾ- əʦaɬ~ɮaj naŋra, maɾo~u saʡo~usi no~u "to~usa", "ɾima",ato~u"mata", "ɾo~umaʔ", "makaən"(ko~umaən) ħanaaj a ʦaʦijaw,o~u ŋaaj a saso~uŋiɾaən ko~unini a mikiŋkiw.
